{'text': ["I've been working on a Stargate (see a few pictures) and one of the primary problems is the open wormhole.",
  " It's supposed to look like a water surface.",
  ' The problem is it takes too long to render all that detail.',
  ' I wanted to make an image sequence and then use that as a simple texture on a single polygon.',
  " The sequence had to be long enough that viewers can't notice the loop yet short enough that it doesn",
  "'t take up too much disk space or too much time to render out.\nThis tutorial will cover how to make an image sequence that can be looped,",
  ' yet still present the illusion of ongoing chaotic change.',
  ' It will be a tutorial, not a recipe.',
  ' Some amount of your own creativity is required.\nLightwave comes with many different flavors of fractal noise,',
  ' and animating that noise in some way is pretty easy.',
  " Let's start with an example.",
  " Start Modeller and create a rectangle that's perpendicular to the Z axis:\nOK, save it. Load that into Layout.",
  ' Open the surface editor and set Double Sided (not strictly necessary, but it saves us the effort of properly aligning the polygon to the camera).',
  ' Change the surface color to black.',
  ' Assign a procedural color texure, and pick one of the myriad fractal noise functions.',
  ' Set the scale to something appropriate so you can see some level of detail.',
  ' Set the procedural texture color to white and do a test render.',
  " You should see something like this:\nIf you were to render several frames, they'd all come out the same since we haven't animated it yet.",
  " Since the rectangle was built perpendicular to the Z axis, changes in the texture's Z position will provide the best illusion of random variation.",
  " Moving the texture's position along the X or Y axes will only give the illusion that the texture is sliding around and not really changing",
  '.\nGo back to the texture editor and click the Position tab.',
  ' Then click on the E button to the right of Z.',
  ' The graph editor will open with the Z axis selected.\nDecide how many frames the animation will last.',
  ' Note that if you plan on using the Ripples texture in your mix of procedurals, it will dictate how many frames you should use.',
  ' The wavelength divided by the wave speed gives you the number of frames before the texture repeats itself.',
  ' Be sure to choose useful values here so that the division results in an integer!',
  " Or, if you're going to use multiple Ripples",
  " textures, use the least common integral multiple for all instances to determine the frame count.\nI'm not going to use Ripples in my mix",
  " so I'm going to arbitrarily use 60 frames.",
  ' At frame 60, create another key and assign it a value:\nRender out frames',
  ' 1 through 60 (not 0 to 60)',
  " and you'll get something like this (you will need Windows Media Player v9 to view).",
  " However, there's a problem.",
  " The last frame rendered isn't the same as frame 0 would have been (had we rendered it)",
  ' and so it won\'t "lead in" very well to frame 1.',
  ' In fact, the whole tail end of the sequence has no relationship with the front end of the sequence.',
  ' Consequently, the loop has abrupt jumps in it.\nThe solution is to use the Oscillator motion modifier.',
  ' Delete the key at frame 60 and then click on the modifiers tab. Add Oscillator and open its property page.',
  ' Set it up like so:\nNote that the cycle time is 2 seconds',
  " (I'm using 30 fps), so the whole cycle will last the 60 frames.",
  " Also note that the start of the cycle is frame 0, but we'll be rendering starting with frame 1.",
  " This way, mathematically, frame 60 is the same as frame 0, and it'll loop nicely.",
  " Here is the result, and here is the loop.\nIt's better, in as much as the sequence loops nicely.",
  " However, this isn't good enough. It looks like it's see-sawing. The sinusoid is ridiculously obvious.",
  ' We need to add to this to get rid of those pauses where the texture turns around.',
  ' Go back to the texture editor and clone this layer twice.',
  " Set the two top layers' blending mode to additive and set all three layers' opacity to something between 30 and 50 percent",
  " (otherwise it'll get all washed out).",
  ' To maximize the effect, we need to move all three textures to different base x,y positions (exact location is pretty much',
  ' irrelevant -',
  " just as long as they're not overlapping):\nNow change the oscillator settings so that the first one has a phase of zero (it should have that already),",
  ' the 2nd has a phase of 120 degrees, and the third has a phase of 240 degrees.',
  ' Looking at just the Z axes will show this',
  ':\nThe important thing to note here is that while any one of the textures is at a crest or a trough, the other two are changing rapidly.',
  " You can use any number of texture layers, as long as it's an odd number.",
  " I'll leave it as an exercise to determine why using an even number isn't helpful.",
  ' The phase values for each layer should be L*360/C, where C is the count of layers and L is the layer number.',
  ' When we render this out, the noise should be devoid of any noticable pattern.',
  ' Here is the result, and here is the loop.\nSo there you have it.',
  ' Now you know how to make a small sequence of apparent randomness that will actually loop for you.',
  ' Watch for movies of my stargate that exploit this technique.',
  ' You can apply it to clipmaps, bump maps, deformation maps - anywhere you can use a procedural texture.\nUPDATE -',
  ' It occurred to me that this can be done with just two layers where one has a phase of zero, and the other has a phase of 90',
  '.',
  " Any other even number of layers doesn't buy you anything (again, think this through for yourself).\nANOTHER UPDATE -",
  " There's an even easier way to do this.",
  ' See my new tutorial for accomplishing this with whole volumes here.'],

```python
script_content = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Script to process JSONL files:
- Join 'text' list into string using special token '<|sentence_spliter|>'
- Process all files in parallel using multiprocessing
"""

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from multiprocessing import Pool, cpu_count
from typing import List

# Configuration
INPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl"
OUTPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl-spliter"
SPECIAL_TOKEN = "<|sentence_spliter|>"


def process_file(input_file_path: str) -> tuple:
    """
    Process a single JSONL file
    
    Args:
        input_file_path: Path to input JSONL file
        
    Returns:
        Tuple of (success: bool, filename: str, processed_lines: int)
    """
    try:
        input_path = Path(input_file_path)
        output_path = Path(OUTPUT_DIR) / input_path.name
        
        processed_lines = 0
        
        # Process the file line by line
        with open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as infile, \\
             open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as outfile:
            
            for line_num, line in enumerate(infile, 1):
                try:
                    # Parse JSON line
                    line = line.strip()
                    if not line:  # Skip empty lines
                        continue
                        
                    data = json.loads(line)
                    
                    # Check if 'text' field exists and is a list
                    if 'text' in data and isinstance(data['text'], list):
                        # Join the list with special token
                        # This preserves all characters and allows splitting later
                        data['text'] = SPECIAL_TOKEN.join(data['text'])
                    
                    # Write the modified JSON to output file
                    # ensure_ascii=False preserves all unicode characters
                    outfile.write(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
                    processed_lines += 1
                    
                except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
                    print(f"  [WARNING] JSON decode error in {input_path.name}, line {line_num}: {e}")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"  [WARNING] Error processing line {line_num} in {input_path.name}: {e}")
        
        return (True, input_path.name, processed_lines)
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] Failed to process file {input_file_path}: {e}")
        return (False, Path(input_file_path).name, 0)


def main():
    """Main function to orchestrate the processing"""
    print("=" * 80)
    print("JSONL Text List to String Converter")
    print("=" * 80)
    print(f"Input directory:  {INPUT_DIR}")
    print(f"Output directory: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    print(f"Special token:    {SPECIAL_TOKEN}")
    print("=" * 80)
    
    # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
    output_dir = Path(OUTPUT_DIR)
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    print(f"✓ Output directory ready: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    
    # Get all JSONL files from input directory
    input_dir = Path(INPUT_DIR)
    if not input_dir.exists():
        print(f"✗ Error: Input directory does not exist: {INPUT_DIR}")
        return
    
    input_files = sorted(input_dir.glob("*.jsonl"))
    
    if not input_files:
        print(f"✗ No JSONL files found in {INPUT_DIR}")
        return
    
    print(f"✓ Found {len(input_files)} JSONL files to process")
    
    # Determine number of processes to use
    num_processes = min(cpu_count(), len(input_files))
    print(f"✓ Using {num_processes} parallel processes (CPU count: {cpu_count()})")
    print("=" * 80)
    print("Starting processing...")
    print("-" * 80)
    
    # Process files in parallel
    with Pool(processes=num_processes) as pool:
        results = pool.map(process_file, [str(f) for f in input_files])
    
    # Calculate statistics
    successful = sum(1 for r in results if r[0])
    total_lines = sum(r[2] for r in results)
    
    # Print summary
    print("-" * 80)
    print("Processing complete!")
    print("=" * 80)
    print(f"Total files:       {len(input_files)}")
    print(f"Successful:        {successful}")
    print(f"Failed:            {len(input_files) - successful}")
    print(f"Total lines:       {total_lines}")
    print("=" * 80)
    
    # Print details of successful files
    if successful > 0:
        print("\\nSuccessfully processed files:")
        for success, filename, lines in results:
            if success:
                print(f"  ✓ {filename} ({lines} lines)")
    
    # Print details of failed files
    failed_files = [r for r in results if not r[0]]
    if failed_files:
        print("\\nFailed files:")
        for success, filename, lines in failed_files:
            print(f"  ✗ {filename}")
    
    print("\\nOutput files saved to:", OUTPUT_DIR)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
'''

# Save the script
script_path = "process_jsonl_join_text.py"
with open(script_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(script_content)

print(f"✓ Python script created: {script_path}")
print("\n" + "="*80)
print("Script Features:")
print("="*80)
print("1. 读取所有 JSONL 文件")
print("2. 将每行JSON中的 'text' 列表用 '<|sentence_spliter|>' 连接成字符串")
print("3. 保留所有字符（使用 ensure_ascii=False）")
print("4. 支持后期通过 split('<|sentence_spliter|>') 还原")
print("5. 使用多进程并行处理所有文件")
print("6. 详细的进度显示和错误处理")
print("\n" + "="*80)
print("使用方法:")
print("="*80)
print(f"python {script_path}")
print("\n或者添加执行权限后直接运行:")
print(f"chmod +x {script_path}")
print(f"./{script_path}")
print("\n" + "="*80)
print("验证方法:")
print("="*80)
print("# 测试是否可以还原原始列表:")
print("import json")
print("with open('output_file.jsonl', 'r') as f:")
```

```python
# 创建一个完整的Python脚本文件
script_content = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
处理JSONL文件，将text字段从list转换为用特殊token连接的字符串
"""

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from multiprocessing import Pool, cpu_count
from tqdm import tqdm

# 配置参数
INPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl"
OUTPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl-spliter"
SPECIAL_TOKEN = "<|sentence_spliter|>"
NUM_PROCESSES = 32  # 可以根据你的CPU核心数调整


def process_single_line(line):
    """处理单行JSON数据"""
    try:
        data = json.loads(line.strip())
        
        # 如果text是list，转换为string
        if isinstance(data.get('text'), list):
            data['text'] = SPECIAL_TOKEN.join(data['text'])
        
        return json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error processing line: {e}")
        return None


def process_file(input_file_path):
    """处理单个JSONL文件"""
    try:
        input_path = Path(input_file_path)
        output_path = Path(OUTPUT_DIR) / input_path.name
        
        # 读取并处理文件
        processed_lines = []
        with open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                if line.strip():  # 跳过空行
                    processed_line = process_single_line(line)
                    if processed_line:
                        processed_lines.append(processed_line)
        
        # 写入输出文件
        with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in processed_lines:
                f.write(line + '\\n')
        
        return f"Successfully processed: {input_path.name}"
    except Exception as e:
        return f"Error processing {input_file_path}: {e}"


def main():
    # 创建输出目录
    os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 获取所有输入文件
    input_files = sorted(Path(INPUT_DIR).glob("*.jsonl"))
    
    if not input_files:
        print(f"No JSONL files found in {INPUT_DIR}")
        return
    
    print(f"Found {len(input_files)} files to process")
    print(f"Using {NUM_PROCESSES} processes")
    print(f"Special token: {SPECIAL_TOKEN}")
    print(f"Output directory: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    print("-" * 60)
    
    # 使用多进程处理文件
    with Pool(processes=NUM_PROCESSES) as pool:
        results = list(tqdm(
            pool.imap(process_file, input_files),
            total=len(input_files),
            desc="Processing files"
        ))
    
    # 打印结果
    print("\\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("Processing completed!")
    print("=" * 60)
    for result in results:
        print(result)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
'''

# 保存脚本文件
script_filename = "process_jsonl_files.py"
with open(script_filename, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(script_content)

print(f"✅ Python脚本已创建: {script_filename}")

print("="*60)

print("   - 读取所有JSONL文件")
print("   - 将text字段从list转换为string，使用<|sentence_spliter|>连接")

print("   - OUTPUT_DIR: 输出目录")
print("   - SPECIAL_TOKEN: 分隔符token")
print("   - NUM_PROCESSES: 进程数")

print("   - 错误处理和日志输出")

print("="*60)

# 显示脚本内容预览
print("\n📄 脚本内容预览:")

print(script_content[:1000] + "\n... (完整内容已保存到文件)")
```

```python
# 生成完整的Python脚本
script_content = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
JSONL文件处理脚本：将text字段的list转换为用特殊token连接的字符串
"""

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from multiprocessing import Pool, cpu_count
from tqdm import tqdm

# 配置参数
INPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl"
OUTPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl-spliter"
SPECIAL_TOKEN = "<|sentence_spliter|>"
NUM_PROCESSES = min(32, cpu_count())  # 使用CPU核心数，最多32个进程


def process_line(line):
    """处理单行JSON数据"""
    try:
        data = json.loads(line.strip())
        
        # 检查text字段是否存在且为列表
        if 'text' in data and isinstance(data['text'], list):
            # 将列表用特殊token连接成字符串
            data['text'] = SPECIAL_TOKEN.join(data['text'])
        
        return json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"处理行时出错: {e}")
        return None


def process_file(input_path):
    """处理单个JSONL文件"""
    try:
        # 构造输出文件路径
        input_filename = os.path.basename(input_path)
        output_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, input_filename)
        
        # 读取并处理文件
        processed_lines = []
        with open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as infile:
            for line in infile:
                if line.strip():  # 跳过空行
                    processed_line = process_line(line)
                    if processed_line:
                        processed_lines.append(processed_line)
        
        # 写入输出文件
        with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as outfile:
            for line in processed_lines:
                outfile.write(line + '\\n')
        
        return f"成功处理: {input_filename} ({len(processed_lines)} 行)"
    
    except Exception as e:
        return f"处理文件 {input_path} 时出错: {e}"


def main():
    """主函数"""
    # 创建输出目录
    os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    print(f"输出目录: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    
    # 获取所有输入文件
    input_files = sorted([
        os.path.join(INPUT_DIR, f) 
        for f in os.listdir(INPUT_DIR) 
        if f.endswith('.jsonl')
    ])
    
    print(f"找到 {len(input_files)} 个文件待处理")
    print(f"使用 {NUM_PROCESSES} 个进程并行处理")
    print(f"特殊分隔符: {SPECIAL_TOKEN}")
    print("-" * 80)
    
    # 使用多进程处理文件
    with Pool(processes=NUM_PROCESSES) as pool:
        results = list(tqdm(
            pool.imap(process_file, input_files),
            total=len(input_files),
            desc="处理进度"
        ))
    
    # 打印结果
    print("\\n" + "=" * 80)
    print("处理完成！结果汇总：")
    print("=" * 80)
    for result in results:
        print(result)
    
    print("\\n所有文件处理完成！")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
'''

# 将脚本保存到文件
output_filename = "process_jsonl_files.py"
with open(output_filename, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(script_content)

print(f"✅ Python脚本已生成: {output_filename}")
```

```python
# 创建完整的Python脚本
script_content = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from multiprocessing import Pool, cpu_count
from tqdm import tqdm

# 配置
INPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl"
OUTPUT_DIR = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split_max_token_31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl-spliter"
SPECIAL_TOKEN = "<|sentence_spliter|>"
NUM_PROCESSES = min(32, cpu_count())  # 使用最多32个进程

def process_single_file(input_path):
    """处理单个JSONL文件"""
    try:
        # 构建输出路径
        filename = os.path.basename(input_path)
        output_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, filename)
        
        # 创建输出目录（如果不存在）
        os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
        
        # 统计处理信息
        processed_count = 0
        error_count = 0
        
        # 打开输入和输出文件
        with open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as infile, open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as outfile:
            for line_num, line in enumerate(infile, 1):
                line = line.strip()
                if not line:  # 跳过空行
                    continue
                
                try:
                    # 解析JSON
                    data = json.loads(line)
                    
                    # 检查text字段是否存在且为列表
                    if 'text' in data and isinstance(data['text'], list):
                        # 将列表连接成字符串
                        data['text'] = SPECIAL_TOKEN.join(data['text'])
                    
                    # 写入处理后的JSON
                    outfile.write(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
                    processed_count += 1
                    
                except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
                    error_count += 1
                    print(f"Warning: JSON decode error in {filename} at line {line_num}: {e}")
                except Exception as e:
                    error_count += 1
                    print(f"Warning: Error processing {filename} at line {line_num}: {e}")
        
        return {
            'file': filename,
            'processed': processed_count,
            'errors': error_count,
            'status': 'success'
        }
        
    except Exception as e:
        return {
            'file': os.path.basename(input_path),
            'processed': 0,
            'errors': 0,
            'status': f'failed: {str(e)}'
        }

def main():
    """主函数"""
    print(f"Input directory: {INPUT_DIR}")
    print(f"Output directory: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    print(f"Special token: {SPECIAL_TOKEN}")
    print(f"Number of processes: {NUM_PROCESSES}")
    print("-" * 80)
    
    # 获取所有JSONL文件
    input_files = sorted([
        os.path.join(INPUT_DIR, f)
        for f in os.listdir(INPUT_DIR)
        if f.endswith('.jsonl')
    ])
    
    if not input_files:
        print("Error: No JSONL files found in input directory!")
        return
    
    print(f"Found {len(input_files)} files to process")
    print("-" * 80)
    
    # 使用多进程处理文件
    with Pool(processes=NUM_PROCESSES) as pool:
        results = list(tqdm(
            pool.imap(process_single_file, input_files),
            total=len(input_files),
            desc="Processing files"
        ))
    
    # 汇总统计信息
    print("\\n" + "=" * 80)
    print("Processing Summary:")
    print("=" * 80)
    
    total_processed = 0
    total_errors = 0
    success_count = 0
    failed_count = 0
    
    for result in results:
        total_processed += result['processed']
        total_errors += result['errors']
        
        if result['status'] == 'success':
            success_count += 1
        else:
            failed_count += 1
            print(f"Failed: {result['file']} - {result['status']}")
    
    print(f"\\nTotal files: {len(input_files)}")
    print(f"Successfully processed: {success_count}")
    print(f"Failed: {failed_count}")
    print(f"Total records processed: {total_processed}")
    print(f"Total errors: {total_errors}")
    print("=" * 80)
    print(f"\\nOutput saved to: {OUTPUT_DIR}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
'''
```
